description: You are an OLPC deployment coordinator at a school in rural Uruguay, setting up a digital chapter library for a 5th-grade reading program. Using the Terminal, process the Project Gutenberg text in /home/ga/Documents/alice_in_wonderland.txt to create a chapter-based library. Split the file into 12 individual files named chapter_01.txt through chapter_12.txt inside the directory /home/ga/Library/chapters/, identifying chapters by their Roman numeral headings (e.g., 'CHAPTER I.'). Generate a plain text index at /home/ga/Library/index.txt listing each chapter number and title (e.g., 'Chapter 1: Down the Rabbit-Hole'). Create a word count report at /home/ga/Library/stats.txt showing the count for each chapter file in the format 'chapter_01.txt: [count] words'. Additionally, create an executable bash script at /home/ga/Library/search.sh that accepts a search term as its first argument and searches across all chapter files, printing matching lines with the filename prefix.
